description_text: Cleanroom Mechatronics Technician Full time Secondary vocational education, Bachelor Eindhoven As a Cleanroom Mechatronics Technician, you are responsible for the assembly of high-tech modules, products and machines in a cleanroom environment. In this role, you take care of the assembly, test and packaging of mechatronic or (electro)-mechanical modules or complete machines. You will work for customers in the semiconductor, analytical, and medical equipment industry, within the Brainport region and beyond. Your expertise plays a vital role in bringing high-tech solutions to life, so that they meet the customer agreements and requirements regarding quality, delivery times and efficiency. What excites you as a Cleanroom Mechatronics Technician? From our assembly facility in Eindhoven you like to keep yourself busy with: Assembling, testing, and packaging of mechatronic or (electro-) mechanical modules or complete machines in our cleanroom. Applying your knowledge and skills in mechatronics, cleanliness, and cleanroom behavior to achieve the quality of the product, so that delivery time and efficiency targets are met. Contributing to the creation of the optimal assembly process, suggesting improvements and promoting them. Sounds good so far? We'd love to tell you more… Your future workplace Previous Next This is what you bring to the table A completed Secondary Vocational Education (MBO-4) Mechatronics education or a Bachelor’s degree in Mechatronics, Mechanical Engineering or Electronics. At least 3 years of experience as a technician/prototype technician/service technician in the high-tech industry. Good command of the Dutch and English language, both spoken and written. Competencies: independent, committed, reliable, cooperative, and focused on improving (assembly) processes and products. This is what you can expect in return from Sioux Flexible working hours of 32- 40 hours per week in an inspiring environment. You will work with passionate colleagues in an innovative environment on a variety of technologies and projects. By combining our expertise in software, electronics, mechanics, mechatronics, mathematics and assembly, we make the impossible possible for our customers and get to work on challenging high-tech projects. You get a lot of freedom and responsibility; after all, you know exactly what you are doing. Personal coaching and a training budget of €3000 per year, so that you can continue to develop yourself. We also find it important to have fun together. We organize a lot for our employees, from family festivals and sparkling Christmas parties, to inspiring knowledge sessions for the high-tech community. You will be working at a prime location in the heart of the Brainport region. You will be working on the Sioux Campus and can use our Sioux Labs living room every day for lunch, sports, making music, and sharing your knowledge with colleagues in one of our Tech Labs. High Tech & High Fun We can tell you all about the typical Sioux culture and the challenging high-tech projects. About how you can develop yourself like nowhere else. But we prefer to leave this to our own colleagues. Go to testimonials > For more information about our challenging projects, please check a part of our project portfolio and click here. Important note: This position requires access to controlled technology, as defined in the US Export Administration Regulations (15 C.F.R. § 730, et seq.). Qualified candidates must be legally authorized to access such controlled technology prior to beginning work. Business demands may require Sioux to proceed with candidates who are immediately eligible to access controlled technology. Your new job in 5 steps Thank you for your interest. We are happy to share our selection process with you. Below you will find the steps we go through. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us. We wish you the best of luck with your application at Sioux Technologies! Interested? Send us your CV and motivation letter. Application received One of our recruiters will review your application and get back to you asap. Introduction We will plan an (online) introduction with a Sioux colleague to find out if there is a match. Follow-up conversation(s) In follow-up conversation(s), we dive into the (technical) depth. In some cases a personality test will be part of the conversation and will be discussed with you. In other cases you will be presented with a (technical) case. Both excited? If we are both enthusiastic, we would like to make you an offer. We will talk you through the offer and discuss it with you. Are you already curious about our terms of employment? You can find them here for the Netherlands, Belgium, Germany. Welcome to Sioux Technologies! We welcome you to Sioux and wish you success with your new challenge! Privacy Notice for applicants Pre-employment screening and background checks might be part of your application procedure. Your personal information is managed in compliance with the GDPR regulations. Nadia Ocnariu Senior Talent Acquisition +31 (0)40 - 2677100 jobs@sioux.eu Are you interested?
